summary: Public MagmaMoose monorepo using pnpm workspaces, uv, Turborepo, and mise to consolidate open-source apps plus shared packages. The main runtime surfaces are Cloudflare Workers for Diatreme and Dunmir, a Python RouterOS agent for Dunmir, Chargate scan scripts, and shared contracts/config/auth packages.

root-tooling.purpose: Workspace orchestration, pinned runtime versions, CI, and repo-wide package/workspace metadata.

diatreme-worker.purpose: Cloudflare Worker for Diatreme token brokering, signed commits, Copilot quota, GitHub webhook triage, dispatch, and release aggregation.

chargate-scripts.purpose: Security and lint scanner scripts referenced by the separate Chargate Marketplace action repo.

dunmir-worker.purpose: Hono Cloudflare Worker control plane for agent ingest, admin APIs, tenant management, alerts, D1 state, and R2 backups.

dunmir-worker-auth.purpose: Auth, tenant resolution, environment typing, validation helpers, IDs, notification fanout, and scheduled dead-man checks.

dunmir-agent-cli.purpose: Python Click CLI and daemon for probing RouterOS devices, reporting to the control plane, and running backup/export/update jobs.

dunmir-agent-pipelines.purpose: RouterOS operational jobs: config export normalization/git commits, encrypted backups, inventory, ping, update checks, and update apply.

dunmir-agent-transports.purpose: RouterOS API and SSH transport abstraction used by probes and maintenance jobs.

dunmir-chart-docs.purpose: Helm chart and operator-facing protocol/design docs for deploying the Python agent and understanding worker-agent contracts.

platform-config.purpose: Shared tsconfig, vitest, prettier, and Ruff config files.

platform-schemas.purpose: Shared contract package with matching TypeScript zod and Python Pydantic shapes.

platform-cf-auth.purpose: Shared Stytch B2B session claims and JWKS validators for Cloudflare Workers and Pages.

platform-api-client.purpose: Placeholder typed API client and TanStack Query hooks package for future clients.

platform-ui.purpose: Placeholder shared shadcn web components package; DOM/web only.

callgraph_highlights.note: Single Worker dispatches by URL path; most Diatreme behavior lives in this large file.
Hono app wires public health, agent ingest, admin/customer APIs, superadmin tenants, and cron dead-man alerting.
Agent-facing protocol for heartbeats, job results, commands, backups, config, and public key registration.
Startup path loads local/remote config, registers vault public key when present, then starts the daemon.
One thread per device plus command/config refresh loops; scheduled jobs are interval-driven.
